items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.1.0 Released
items.message:
MiSTer Companion v3.1.0 is now available.

This update adds a Return to Menu button in the Device tab, making it easier to quickly jump back to the MiSTer menu.

A new Now Playing feature has also been introduced, showing the currently running core directly in the Device tab when a game is active.

The Scripts tab has been expanded with the addition of ftp_save_sync, making it easier to set up automated save syncing.

The SaveManager information dialog has also been updated to better explain how manual sync works and when to use it.

You can download the latest stable release below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is now being actively worked on, with recent improvements contributed by DoggyChicken.

To continue improving and properly maintain macOS support long-term, having access to a Mac for development and testing is still essential. At the moment, I rely on community contributions and am unable to test macOS-specific changes directly.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
